goal: Move the player spawn closer to the cell/nucleus so the player appears near the object immediately.
changes: Changed MainCellSwimSpawn CFrame to CFrame.lookAt(...) so the spawn faces the nucleus.
Kept MainCellSwimSpawn non-colliding so it does not block native water diving.
Kept NativeWaterSwimming movement mode and did not reintroduce custom player forces.
validation: Deployed BuildMainCellExperience.lua into Roblox Studio through the legacy bridge.
Ran require(builder).build() in Studio and confirmed the new spawn position is fully inside Terrain water.
result: The player now spawns close to the front of the nucleus/cell object, in water, facing toward the nucleus.
